hero.description: We are a team of qualified Chartered Accountants and Tax Advisors helping individuals and businesses across Ireland with accounting, tax planning, payroll, and more — with precision, integrity, and care.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Businesses Trust The Tax Link

whyChooseUs.quote: "We go beyond numbers to deliver real value for our clients."

reasons.title: Chartered Accountants
reasons.desc: Our team holds chartered accountancy qualifications with deep expertise in Irish accounting and tax law.

taxPlanning.title: Smart Tax Strategies That Save You Money
taxPlanning.paragraph1: Our proactive tax planning approach ensures you take advantage of every legitimate opportunity to reduce your tax burden while maintaining full compliance with Irish tax legislation.
taxPlanning.paragraph2: Whether you're a sole trader, a partnership, or a limited company, we craft a personalised tax strategy designed to protect your wealth and support your growth.

features.desc: Legally reduce your tax liability with expert planning strategies tailored to you.

features.title: Revenue Compliance
features.desc: Stay fully compliant with Irish Revenue requirements, on time, every time.

features.title: Capital Taxes
features.desc: Strategic advice on CGT, CAT, stamp duty, and inheritance tax planning.

features.title: Maximise Reliefs
features.desc: Identify and claim every available tax relief, credit, and deduction.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say

items.name: Sarah O'Brien
items.text: The Tax Link transformed our finances. Their expertise saved us thousands in tax liability and gave us the confidence to expand our business. Truly exceptional service.

items.name: Michael Doyle
items.text: Professional, responsive, and incredibly knowledgeable. They handle our accounts, payroll, and corporate tax with precision and always meet every deadline. Highly recommended!

items.name: Aoife Murphy
items.text: As a business owner, I needed advisors I could truly trust. The Tax Link made everything simple, stress-free, and delivered real savings. Their team is absolutely brilliant.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find quick answers to the most common questions about our services.

items.q: What services does The Tax Link offer?
items.a: We provide a full suite of business services including accounting, taxation, bookkeeping, payroll, corporate secretarial, trademark registration, technology, marketing, and outsourcing solutions.

items.q: Do you work with individuals or only businesses?
items.a: We work with both individuals and businesses of all sizes, from sole traders and freelancers to large corporations and multinationals.

items.q: How much does a consultation cost?
items.a: Your initial consultation is completely free. We'll discuss your needs and provide a transparent quote with no hidden fees.
Yes, we are proudly based in Ireland and serve clients throughout the country. We also support international clients doing business in Ireland.
Simply book a free consultation through our website or call us at +353 85 133 0866. We'll take it from there!

items.q: Can you help with Revenue audits?
items.a: Absolutely. Our team has extensive experience in managing Revenue audits and can guide you through the entire process with confidence.

cta.title: Ready to Take Control of Your Finances?
cta.description: Book your free consultation today and discover how The Tax Link can help your business thrive.
